name: CFSync
description: CFSync is a local web dashboard for Creality K1 series printers with CFS (Colour Filament System). It connects to your printer via WebSocket for real-time spool monitoring and integrates with Spoolman for filament consumption tracking.

notes.text: After installation, edit /opt/cfsync/data/config.json to set your printer IP and optional Spoolman URL, then restart the service: systemctl restart cfsync
